methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series B → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.9x) to $68M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 6 same-sector + same-stage peers in Climate & Energy. Range: $120M - $5.0B.

data.narrative:
Ambient Photonics is a Series B-stage Climate & Energy company that has raised $68M to date. The valuation analysis draws on a comp universe of nine peers across the sector—one public entity and eight private companies at equivalent stage, including Commonwealth Fusion Systems ($5.0B), Pano AI ($500M), Sage Geosystems ($400M), Reverion ($310M), and CarbonCapture Inc. ($300M).

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis, using the $68M total raised as a proxy for current value and applying a typical 1.9x Series B step-up multiplier, yields $129M. Peer-median valuation across the six same-sector, same-stage comparables produces a median of $355M, with a range from $120M to $5.0B. The median comparison reflects material heterogeneity in the peer set, with Commonwealth Fusion Systems representing a significant outlier at $5.0B.

The two methods triangulate to a range of $110M–$408M, with a median implied valuation of $242M. This band reflects meaningful tension between Ambient Photonics' early fundraising profile and the upper-quartile valuations observed among mature Series B climate tech peers. Key uncertainties include whether the company's technology trajectory and capital efficiency warrant peer-set median multiples versus stage-typical progression, and the weight of the $5.0B outlier in the peer comparisons.
